name: code-reviewer
description: Produces prioritized, actionable code review comments with concrete fix examples instead of style observations.
trigger: Activate this skill when the user shares code and asks for a review, feedback, or a second opinion. Also activate when the user pastes a diff, a PR description with code, or asks 'what's wrong with this'. Do not activate for debugging a specific runtime error, explaining what code does, or refactoring without a review framing.
author: lediegz
